title: hagenia abyssinica
intro: Hagenia abyssinica, also known as the St. Peter's Wort, is a flowering plant native to the highlands of Ethiopia. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Hagenia abyssinica include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, such as urinary tract infections and respiratory tract infections. Herbal preparations of Hagenia abyssinica typically involve the leaves and roots being dried and then infused in hot water to make a tea or decoction.
